info.name: Widia Kencana - Document
info.description: Document endpoints for Widia Kencana API. Rule: 1 route = 1 endpoint item.

request.description: Read active paper/media options for document setup.

query.description: Optional. Use all to include every element with properties and options, or use a specific code such as grid.

request.description: Read active element palette options. Without code, response is lightweight. With code=all, response includes each element properties and property options.
Read active selectable options for document properties.

query.description: Optional. Exact element code filter, for example grid, text, image, table.

request.description: Read active mapping between selected element and editable properties. Optional element_code filter returns only properties for one element and includes property options.

query.description: Optional. Case-insensitive LIKE filter for document name.

request.description: List documents. Optional filters: name uses case-insensitive LIKE, token uses exact UUID match.

query.description: Optional. Set true to include document layer tree grouped by header, body, and footer.

request.description: Replace last path segment with document token. Use with_layer=true to include layer tree with element properties and options.

request.description: Create a document template. position is assigned by backend default and is not required on create. document_type options: quotation, purchase-order, invoice, service-report, custom. If document_type is empty, backend defaults it to custom. status options: draft, active, inactive, archived, deleted.

Replace last path segment with document token. document_type options: quotation, purchase-order, invoice, service-report, custom. If document_type is empty, backend defaults it to custom. status options: draft, active, inactive, archived, deleted.
Soft delete document by setting status to deleted.

Create a document layer. Use document/parent/element tokens, not numeric IDs. parent_token is empty for root layer. Replace element_token with token from GET /api/document-master/elements?code=all in your database. Request samples are available in this request examples list.

response.name: Create Grid Layer - Success
response.body:
{
  "status": "ok",
  "message": "Document layer created successfully",
  "data": {
    "layer": {
      "token": "00000000-0000-0000-0000-000000000601",
      "document_token": "00000000-0000-0000-0000-000000000501",
      "parent_token": "",
      "element": {
        "token": "55bc433b-c5b4-41e6-be8b-d964d343bc42",
        "code": "grid",
        "name": "Grid",
        "renderer_type": "html",
        "renderer_tag": "div",
        "content_type": "none",
        "is_container": true,
        "status": "active",
        "properties": []
      },
      "region": "body",
      "name": "Two Column Grid",
      "content": {},
      "properties": {
        "display": "grid",
        "grid-template-columns": "[50,50]",
        "width": "100%",
        "height": "auto",
        "gap": "16",
        "padding": "16",
        "margin": "0",
        "background-color": "#FFFFFF",
        "border": "0",
        "border-style": "solid",
        "border-radius": "0",
        "justify-content": "flex-start",
        "align-items": "stretch"
      },
      "position": 1,
      "status": "active",
      "created_at": "2026-07-13T10:00:00Z",
      "updated_at": "2026-07-13T10:00:00Z"
    }
  }
}

response.name: Create Image Layer - Success
Create List Layer - Success
response.body:
{
  "status": "ok",
  "message": "Document layer created successfully",
  "data": {
    "layer": {
      "token": "00000000-0000-0000-0000-000000000604",
      "document_token": "00000000-0000-0000-0000-000000000501",
      "parent_token": "",
      "element": {

        "code": "list",
        "name": "List",
        "renderer_type": "html",
        "renderer_tag": "ul",
        "content_type": "list",
        "is_container": false,
        "status": "active",
        "properties": []
      },
      "region": "body",
      "name": "Scope List",
      "content": {
        "items": [
          "Supply equipment",
          "Installation",
          "Testing and commissioning"
        ]
      },

        "list-style-position": "inside",
        "font-family": "Arial",
        "font-size": "16",
        "font-weight": "400",
        "font-style": "normal",
        "text-decoration": "none",
        "line-height": "1.5",
        "color": "#000000",

        "padding": "16"
      },

      "updated_at": "2026-07-13T10:00:00Z"
    }
  }
}

response.name: Create QR Code Layer - Success
Create Page Break Layer - Success

request.description: Update document layer by layer token. Request body uses the same shape as create.
Sort sibling layers inside the same document, parent, and region group.
Soft delete document layer by token. Child layers are also soft deleted.
